hooks.command: echo 'goAML SAFETY: a submit tool was invoked. Filing to the UAE FIU is IRREVERSIBLE and requires dryRun=false + confirm=true + the MLRO role; the goAML server enforces this. Always dry-run and review the XML with a human before a real submission.' >&2
echo 'goAML SAFETY: posting to the FIU MessageBoard sends to the regulator and requires confirm=true + the MLRO role.' >&2
